description: Remap keyboard shortcuts: F->A (Timer/Alarm), I->E (Card Editor), add C (Clone Panel), E->M (Edit Mode), keep R (Reminder), C->L (Link/Connect nodes). Update all UI tooltips and hints.
steps: Step 1: Change Timer/Alarm shortcut from F to A in the handleTimerKey useEffect
Step 2: Change Card Editor Panel shortcut from I to E in the handleCardEditorKey useEffect
Step 3: Change Edit Mode shortcut from E to M in the handleEditModeKey useEffect
Step 4: Remove M key from Mini Map handler (M is now used for Edit Mode)
Step 5: Change Connect/Link shortcut from C to L in the handleConnectKey useEffect
Step 6: Add new C key handler for toggling Clone Panel

Step 7: Update all UI titles/tooltips: 'Edit Mode (E)' -> 'Edit Mode (M)', 'Timer (F)' -> 'Alarm/Timer (A)', 'Card Editor' -> 'Card Editor (E)', 'Show Clone Nodes' -> 'Clone Panel (C)', 'Toggle Mini Map (M)' -> 'Toggle Mini Map'
Step 8: Update any comments that reference old shortcut keys
acceptance_criteria: E key toggles card editor panel
L key links/connects two selected nodes
F key no longer triggers any action
I key no longer triggers any action
Mini Map M shortcut is removed (button still works)
All UI tooltips reflect new shortcut assignments
npm run build completes without errors
verification: Run 'cd /projects/sandbox/Clear-mind && npm run build' and confirm it succeeds with no errors
findings: All shortcuts remapped successfully. The M key was reassigned from Mini Map to Edit Mode; the Mini Map toggle is still accessible via its toolbar button. Build passes with pre-existing chunk size warning.
